ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the subject is worth */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that offers the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam session */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the exam covers */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date when the exam took place */,
  "total_questions" INTEGER /* Total number of questions in the exam */,
  "exam_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of exam */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the exam was held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who administered the exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_exam_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_type_id") REFERENCES exam_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "cohort" TEXT /* Cohort the student belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the exam */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "pass" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student passed the exam */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the student to complete the exam */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "pass_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students who passed the exam */,
  "average_mark" TEXT /* Average score of all students who took the exam */,
  "median_mark" TEXT /* Median score of all students who took the exam */,
  "standard_deviation" TEXT /* Standard deviation of the scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_difficulty" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the questions */,
  "difficulty_score" TEXT /* Numerical score for the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_difficulty_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the difficulty level of the question */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES question_difficulty ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES question_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_questions_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the question type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exam type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question performance metric */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "average_score" TEXT /* Average score achieved by students on the question */,
  "pass_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of students who answered the question correctly */,
  "standard_deviation" TEXT /* Standard deviation of the scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_performance_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES exam_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the student */,
  "feedback_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of aggregate feedback */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "average_feedback_score" TEXT /* Average score of the feedback provided for the exam */,
  "total_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries for the exam */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Summary of the feedback text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_feedback_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade scale */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "grade_scale" TEXT /* Description of the grading scale used */,
  "pass_mark" INTEGER /* Minimum mark required to pass the exam */,
  "grading_scale_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the grading scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_grades_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam result */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the exam was taken */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year in which the exam was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_history_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES exam_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
